subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, and verily it calleth the people unto the Most Exalted Horizon, this Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم و انه یدع الناس الی الافق الاعلی هذا الافق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
